job_description:
Business Analyst

The Business Analyst plays a key role in ensuring requirements are clearly understood, accurately documented, and traceable throughout the software development lifecycle. This role focuses on translating business and functional inputs into structured, standardized documentation that supports effective development, testing, and delivery. Working closely with business analysts, design teams, and technical stakeholders, the role ensures consistency, clarity, and alignment across all requirement artifacts.

Key Responsibilities

  • Create Software Requirement Specifications (SRS) based on inputs from Core Business Analysts, stakeholder discussions, and requirement walkthroughs
  • Prepare Business Requirement Documents (BRD) using approved templates while ensuring business intent and system behavior are clearly documented
  • Participate in requirement discussions to understand business objectives, functional flows, dependencies, and assumptions before documentation
  • Analyze requirements to identify gaps, ambiguities, and inconsistencies, and work with Core BAs to resolve them
  • Document functional flows, business rules, and acceptance criteria where applicable to support development and QA teams
  • Document wireframes, UI flows, validations, and UI specifications in collaboration with design and product teams
  • Maintain change logs, version history, and document updates throughout the project lifecycle
  • Create and manage traceability matrices linking business, functional, and technical requirements
  • Maintain cross-references across BRD, SRS, UI, API, and related documentation
  • Ensure documentation consistency, completeness, and alignment with approved scope and delivery timelines
  • Ensure accurate and timely PMS updates with structured documentation details
  • Support development, QA, UAT, and audit processes through clear, traceable, and up-to-date documentation
  • Assist in requirement reviews, walkthroughs, and validation sessions with internal and client stakeholders

Required Skills and Experience

  • 1 to 4 years of experience in Business Analysis documentation or related roles
  • Strong experience in BRD and SRS creation
  • Hands-on experience with documentation templates, standards, and version control
  • Ability to document UI wireframes and functional flows clearly
  • Working knowledge of APIs and system integrations for documentation purposes
  • Experience with project management systems and documentation tools
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple documents in parallel
  • Excellent written communication and stakeholder coordination skills

Minimum Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field
  • 1 to 4 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com
summary: The Business Analyst translates business needs into structured documentation, ensuring clarity and traceability across development. Responsibilities include creating BRD/SRS, collaborating with design and technical teams, and maintaining consistent, up-to-date documentation.

job_description:
Senior Business Analyst

At 2Base, we are rebuilding the Business Analyst function into a world-class, product-minded, clarity-driven team. This role is not a documentation role. It is not a screen updater role. It is not a support role. This is a core Business Analyst position responsible for functional modelling, system reasoning, requirement clarity, and building the foundation for correct development.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead requirement workshops, client calls, and discovery discussions to understand business needs clearly.
  • Ask deeper questions, challenge assumptions, and validate the true business intent behind every requirement.
  • Convert ambiguous client inputs into structured, logical, and actionable functional understanding.
  • Break large features into modules, workflows, components, and clear dependencies.
  • Build strong system-level understanding involving APIs, integrations, data flow, and backend considerations.
  • Translate business processes into functional logic that development teams can execute.
  • Decompose requirements into use-case flows, system behaviours, edge cases, alternate paths, validation rules, and dependencies.
  • Prepare high-quality documentation, including BRD, FRD, SRS, workflows, state diagrams, data-flow diagrams, API requirement specs, and acceptance criteria.
  • Ensure all documentation is clear, logical, structured, testable, and ready for developers and QA to use.
  • Collaborate closely with developers, architects, QA, and product owners to validate feasibility and align understanding.
  • Ensure QA teams can derive test cases effectively from your functional logic and acceptance criteria.
  • Communicate confidently with clients, handle requirement discussions smoothly, and clarify misunderstandings immediately.
  • Push back politely on unclear or changing requirements and ensure final decisions are documented properly.
  • Maintain requirement traceability throughout the lifecycle and ensure zero ambiguity during handover to development.
  • Own the entire requirement lifecycle from discovery to development readiness with high accountability.
  • Drive clarity across teams by ensuring every requirement is complete, validated, and logically consistent.

Required Skills & Experience

  • Minimum 4+ years of core Business Analyst experience with strong analytical and system-level thinking.
  • Ability to break down complex requirements into clear components, workflows, and functional logic.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication with confidence in client interactions and clarifications.
  • Proven experience in preparing SRS, BRD, FRD, workflows, and acceptance criteria with high clarity.
  • Ability to challenge assumptions politely, ask the right questions, and ensure zero ambiguity.
  • Strong collaboration experience with development, QA, architects, and cross-functional teams.
  • Understanding of API behaviours, integrations, data flows, and multi-module system interactions.
  • Ability to run requirement discussions, workshops, and independently lead discovery sessions.
  • Exposure to SaaS, scalable products, automation, or AI-supported systems is an added advantage.
  • Demonstrated ownership of requirements end-to-end, ensuring developer-ready and testable outputs.
  • Not suitable for UI-only thinkers, passive communicators, template-based writers, or those relying on AI for answers.
  • Success is defined by clear, testable requirements, zero rework, strong cross-team alignment, and confident communication.
  • Candidates must align with 2Base’s structured thinking, clarity-driven culture, and transformation of the BA function.

Minimum Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or related field
  • 4 to 8 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst
  • Experience in SaaS or scalable product environments
  • Exposure to AI/Automation, integrations, or multi-module systems
  • Ability to run independent client workshops
  • Must have independently handled requirement ownership for at least one full project lifecycle

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Senior Business Analyst role at 2Base focuses on functional modeling, requirement clarity, and system reasoning to drive aligned development. Requires 4+ years of core BA experience with SaaS and API expertise.

DevOps / Platform Engineer

Experience: 4–6 Years Team: Phases Server / Platform Engineering Qualification: Bachelor’s degree in computer science or related field Notice Period: Immediate to 30 Days preferred

Role Overview

Phases is seeking a DevOps / Platform Engineer to join the Server Team and build, secure, and scale infrastructure across hybrid environments. This role focuses on cloud infrastructure, automation, monitoring, and platform reliability. You will collaborate with engineering teams to ensure high availability, security, and operational efficiency while improving deployment pipelines, observability, and infrastructure automation. The ideal candidate has expertise in cloud platforms, container orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, and production operations.

Key Responsibilities

Infrastructure & Cloud Platform: - Design, deploy, and maintain infrastructure across AWS, Azure, On-Prem, and hybrid environments. - Manage and optimize cloud services (compute, networking, storage, databases). - Configure secure network architectures (VPCs, subnets, load balancers, access controls). - Maintain Linux-based servers and virtualized environments using open-source platforms (e.g., Proxmox, KVM). - Ensure infrastructure scaling, capacity planning, and cloud cost optimization.

Containerization & Platform Engineering: - Deploy and manage containerized workloads using Docker and Kubernetes/Red Hat OpenShift. - Maintain cluster health, manage workloads, and ensure platform stability. - Implement container security, resource management, and workload isolation. - Support engineering teams in building and deploying cloud-native applications.

CI/CD & Automation: - Design CI/CD pipelines using GitLab CI, Jenkins, or GitHub Actions. - Automate deployments across environments. - Implement Infrastructure as Code (IaC) with Terraform, Ansible, or CloudFormation. - Manage environment configurations, secrets, and deployment workflows.

Monitoring, Observability & Reliability: - Implement monitoring/logging/alerting systems (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, CloudWatch). - Establish proactive monitoring for system performance and reliability. - Define operational metrics and improve incident response processes. - Investigate production issues and maintain operational documentation.

Security & DevSecOps Practices: - Enforce security best practices across infrastructure and applications. - Manage IAM roles, access control, secrets, and encryption. - Perform security audits and maintain compliance. - Ensure secure configuration of cloud resources, databases, and network access.

Collaboration & Platform Enablement: - Work with backend engineers, QA teams, and product teams to improve deployment processes. - Mentor developers on infrastructure/deployment best practices. - Contribute to platform engineering standards, documentation, and automation.

Required Skills & Experience

  • 4–6 years in DevOps, Platform Engineering, or Site Reliability Engineering.
  • Strong AWS/Azure experience.
  • Kubernetes/OpenShift expertise.
  • Linux administration and production system management.
  • CI/CD tools (GitLab CI, Jenkins, GitHub Actions).
  • IaC tools (Terraform, Ansible, CloudFormation).
  • Networking concepts (VPCs, load balancers, firewalls).
  • Monitoring/logging systems and troubleshooting skills.

Nice to Have

  • OpenShift/enterprise Kubernetes experience.
  • Database administration/optimization.
  • Observability platforms/APM tools.
  • DevSecOps in CI/CD pipelines.

Soft Skills

  • Analytical problem-solving.
  • Incident management under pressure.
  • Clear communication with technical/non-technical stakeholders.
  • Documentation-oriented mindset.
  • Collaborative cross-functional teamwork.

Contact: Submit your CV via the form here: https://jobs.phases.dk. Applications must be submitted through the official form. For questions, contact _@c.c.

CareRevenue builds cloud platforms that modernize U.S. dental practices. Brief Description

DeviceDriven is driving a major fintech-led digital transformation to modernize a global-scale loyalty, rewards, and engagement platform. This platform enables millions of secure, real-time transactions across ecosystems like travel, retail, gift cards, and digital assets, delivering scalable, data-driven customer experiences for financial institutions. Built on cloud-native architecture, micro frontends, and AI-augmented development, the initiative redefines next-generation fintech user experiences at scale.

What You’ll Work On

  • Re-architect and enhance responsive, data-rich Angular applications for global banking and loyalty customers.
  • Integrate RESTful and GraphQL APIs from a microservice-based backend in real time.
  • Implement dynamic UI workflows for redemption, travel booking, and partner product catalogs.
  • Use AI-assisted coding tools (OpenAI, GitHub Copilot, Amazon Q, Claude) to accelerate delivery, improve test coverage, and optimize code quality.
  • Integrate observability and analytics into frontend modules for actionable user insights.
  • Collaborate with UX, QA, backend, and DevOps teams in an agile, data-driven development model.

Preferred Skills

Required Experience

  • 6–12 years of frontend development experience with Angular and Angular JS, and a strong foundation in JavaScript/TypeScript.

Core Responsibilities

  • Design and build high-performance, modular UIs using Angular and TypeScript.
  • Develop reusable components, libraries, and shared frameworks aligned with enterprise standards.
  • Integrate with backend REST/GraphQL APIs, ensuring efficient data handling and state management.
  • Implement unit, integration, and end-to-end tests (Karma, Jasmine, Cypress, Playwright).
  • Apply AI-assisted workflows for code generation, linting, and test automation.
  • Collaborate with design, QA, and DevOps teams to ensure CI/CD pipeline integration, accessibility, and performance.

Technical Expertise

  • Core Frameworks: Angular 9+ (mandatory), AngularJS (legacy), ReactJS (advantage), Node.js, Express
  • Languages & Tools: TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, SCSS, LESS, Bootstrap, Material Design
  • Architecture: Micro frontends, Angular Universal (SSR), modular component libraries
  • State Management: NgRx / Redux / Akita
  • Testing: Karma, Jasmine, Protractor (legacy), Jest, Cypress, Playwright
  • Cloud & DevOps: AWS (S3, CloudFront, Cognito, API Gateway), Docker, Jenkins, GitHub Actions
  • AI & Productivity Tools: GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude for intelligent code completion, test generation, and documentation
  • Analytics & Observability: Integration with BI and tracking tools (Google Analytics, Segment, Mixpanel, Grafana dashboards)
  • Security & Performance: OWASP guidelines, CSP, XSS prevention, JWT/OAuth2 for secure API communication

Bonus Experience

  • Exposure to fintech, loyalty, or e-commerce frontends (redemption, catalog, checkout workflows).
  • Experience building white-label UI systems with configurable themes and modular branding.
  • Familiarity with hybrid app frameworks (React Native) for extending web apps to mobile.
  • Experience working alongside backend teams using Java/Spring Boot APIs.
  • Proficiency in CI/CD optimization, bundle analysis, and web performance tuning.

How to Apply

Send your resume, GitHub/LinkedIn profile, and a short introduction to: jobs@devicedriven.com
summary: Senior Angular Developer with 6–12 years of experience required to build fintech platforms using Angular, TypeScript, and integrate with microservices.

Role Summary

We are seeking a proactive and highly skilled Technical Support Engineer to provide exceptional technical support for overseas projects. The role requires working in rotational shifts to ensure 24/7 availability, troubleshooting complex issues across cloud platforms, networking, application architectures, and DevOps toolchains. The ideal candidate should be self-motivated, collaborative, agile, and a continuous learner.

Key Responsibilities

  • Provide technical support and troubleshoot issues related to Fargate, ECS, DynamoDB, BigQuery, SNS, etc.
  • Analyze logs and metrics using CloudWatch, Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Alert Manager, and Splunk.
  • Resolve networking challenges involving load balancers, API gateways, reverse proxies, ingress controllers, and service-to-service communications.
  • Address client-server communications, firewalls, and virtual machine issues.
  • Collaborate with DevOps teams to manage toolchains like Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, and Ingress Controllers.
  • Act as the first point of contact for technical queries and escalate issues when necessary.
  • Liaise with development and operations teams to identify root causes and resolve incidents.
  • Document troubleshooting steps and maintain a knowledge base for recurring issues.
  • Implement best practices for monitoring and incident response with cross-functional teams.
  • Participate in shift handovers and provide timely updates on ongoing issues.

Preferred Skills

Cloud Platforms and Services

  • Hands-on experience with Fargate and ECS for containerized workloads.
  • Proficiency in DynamoDB and BigQuery for data analysis.
  • Debugging SNS message delivery and integration workflows.

Monitoring and Logging Tools

  • Expertise in CloudWatch Logs, Loki, and Splunk for log analysis.
  • Experience with Prometheus and Grafana for system health monitoring.
  • Configuration of Alert Manager for alert escalation.

Networking and Security

  • Troubleshooting load balancers (ALB, NLB) and API Gateways (AWS API Gateway, NGINX).
  • Knowledge of reverse proxies and ingress controllers (NGINX Ingress, Traefik).
  • Understanding of service-to-service communications (DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, gRPC).
  • Hands-on experience with firewalls, security groups, and IAM roles.
  • VM troubleshooting on platforms like AWS EC2.

DevOps Toolchains

  • Proficiency in Docker for container runtime debugging.
  • Kubernetes expertise for managing deployments, ingress setups, and pod troubleshooting.
  • CI/CD pipeline experience with Jenkins, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD.
  • Knowledge of Ingress controllers (NGINX, Traefik) and SSL termination.

Troubleshooting and Incident Management

  • Strong problem-solving skills for root cause analysis using logs and metrics.
  • Documentation of troubleshooting steps and solutions.

Collaboration and Communication

  • Cross-functional teamwork with DevOps, development, and operations teams.
  • Effective communication for issue escalation and shift handovers.
  • Proficiency in tools like Slack, JIRA, Confluence, and Google Workspace.
summary: Seeking a proactive Technical Support Engineer with 0-2 years of experience to provide 24/7 support for cloud platforms, troubleshoot DevOps toolchains, and collaborate with cross-functional teams.
